programs.title: My Reno Rules
programs.desc: The stakes skyrocket as Adrian Portelli drops a huge announcement to turn the competition on its head. Teams race to finish, driven by the desire to win big, but the judges are in for a mixed bag.

programs.title: House Of Wellness
programs.desc: Join Mel Doyle and Shane Crawford where no topic is off limits from mental health, innovations in health, treatments for common illnesses, natural medicines, and explorations into food.

programs.title: The Agenda Setters
programs.desc: Footy’s home of hard-hitting opinions, breaking news, and respected analysis. Seven’s team of trusted and respected footy voices tackle the biggest topics and take viewers behind the headlines.

programs.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programs.desc: Kerry and Tom battle to save a woman who’s in cardiac arrest. A man’s stabbed several times at a residential address. A hero toddler calls 999 when his mum falls down the stairs.

programs.title: New Amsterdam
programs.desc: The pressure is on as Max takes on his first annual fundraising gala at the hospital, and emotions are high as some of the doctors' families join them for the event.

programs.title: Harry's Practice
programs.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.
